title: HealthResponse
description: Response from a provider's health endpoint indicating operational status and capabilities

version.description: OSP protocol version the provider is currently running

supported_versions.description: All OSP protocol versions this provider supports

uptime_seconds.description: Number of seconds the provider has been running since last restart

checks.description: Individual health check results for provider subsystems

HealthCheck.description: Individual health check for a provider subsystem

name.description: Name of the subsystem being checked (e.g., 'provision', 'database', 'credentials')

latency_ms.description: Response latency of this subsystem in milliseconds
